LinearLayout:
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/catCard" <<<<<<< HEAD android:layout_width="64dp" android:layout_height="64dp" app:cardCornerRadius="32dp" app:cardElevation="2dp" app:strokeWidth="1dp" ======= android:layout_width="66dp" android:layout_height="66dp" app:cardCornerRadius="33dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeWidth="1.5dp" >>>>>>> origin/main app:strokeColor="@color/premium_divider" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/premium_surface">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/catIcon" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" <<<<<<< HEAD android:padding="16dp" ======= android:padding="18dp" >>>>>>> origin/main android:scaleType="centerInside" android:src="@drawable/ic_placeholder_circle" app:tint="@color/colorPrimary" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/catTitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" <<<<<<< HEAD android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:text="Category" android:textSize="13sp" android:fontFamily="sans-serif-medium" android:textColor="@color/premium_text_main" android:gravity="center" android:maxWidth="80dp" android:maxLines="1" android:ellipsize="end"/> ======= android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:text="Category" android:textSize="12sp" android:fontFamily="sans-serif-medium" android:textColor="@color/premium_text_main" android:gravity="center" android:maxWidth="84dp" android:maxLines="1" android:ellipsize="end" android:alpha="0.8"/> >>>>>>> origin/main
